steps.title: Identify what counts as a concrete example of a nickname
steps.content: An example must name the specific nickname itself. The notes contain exactly one named nickname: Scotty.

steps.title: Select the choice that names the nickname
steps.content:
The correct answer explicitly provides the nickname by name—Scotty—and identifies what it's the nickname of.

The other choices either omit the nickname name entirely or discuss nicknames generally without providing the specific example the task demands.

C is correct.
